entry.title: How can I increase document number input in open item selection in FB05 from 10 to 20 rows
entry.content: What is the process to increase number of rows. I have only 10 rows. Want to increase same to atleast 20. Have seen few screenshots online where certain users have 27 to 28 rows in FB05

entry.title: FSCM credit management: automatic release of deliveries with prepayments
entry.content:
Dear experts,
 
we have FSCM in place and use credit management. Our release is  S/4 2020/21 SPS 3. 
I have questions regarding the following process:
a customer has no credit limit and pays always in advance. The prepayment amount covers the order/ delivery amount, so that the credit limit check is generally positive. But the concerned deliveries always land up in SCASE and need to get unblocked manually. Is this the standard process? (I understand, if yes, because it's better to control it every time instead of trusting the customer. I just want the confirmation, as I haven't found any possibility to change the process 😊)
We would prefer, that such deliveries will not get blocked, when the prepayment is available and the amount equal or higher than the delivery. 
The same logic can be applied, when the customer balance is sufficient - I mean, when customer has overpayments or credit notes (debit > credit). Does SAP standard provide any possibility to set it up - by customizing, by BAdI, by user exit or else? 
 
Thanks a lot and best regards, Carina

entry.title: FSCM credit management: credit check step 140
entry.content:
Dear all, 
 
we have FSCM in place and use credit management. Our release is  S/4 2020/21 SPS 3. 
I found the new check step "140 check credit limit validity" in OSS note 2926009 and I would like to know:
  • what exactly does this step do? Could anyone explain with an example? 
  • would is be possible to implement this step also to our release 20/21 SPS3, although it's mentioned, that it's available in a later release? 
Many thanks in advance and best regards, Carina

entry.title: Any standard program to update AFBN without editing standard Tables
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Is there any standard SAP program we've to perform AFBN without editing standard table in debug mode?

Currently we're performing this activity in debug mode after updating custom table -
Table - T093A - will be updated for CoD -->90--> from 00 to 30 (WRTAFB) --> AFBN to activate area 90,91 and 92 --> Go back to T093A and update from 30 (old) to 00

Table - T093B - will be updated for companies, ABGJA  for dep area 90,91 and 92

Note - These are the new depreciation area we've created as a part of Turkey Inflation Asset Accounting.

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Automatic payment program not picking up a vendor
entry.content: We are facing issues with the payment run. There is one vendor for which payment specification is not sent. The last time it worked was on 14.03.2024 and suddenly it stopped working now. Can anybody help me with the correct tcodes and steps to check this issue.

entry.title: Merging Customer & Vendor into single BP
entry.content:
Hello,

During CVI pre-conversion activity on ECC/ERP system, If we want to merge customers and vendors into single BP which are having same legal entity (address) then in customization path do we need to assign customer & vendor account group to the same BP Grouping? Not all customers & vendors from those account groups are eligible to merge into single BP.

Thank you

entry.title: Add a new program in FF_5
entry.content:
Dear members,


Do you know how can I add in transaction FF_5 a new line with a new program?

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Business area
entry.content:
Hi @AK6 

It would have helped if you had shared the business scenario where you would want to change the business area and also the system version as well as additional details  (Document splitting with Business Area as one of the criterion). Also do you have special ledger as well in your system for reporting purposes.

Let us take a simple example of material document, a change in business area could be effected as answered earlier:

Changing Business Area in a Material Document - SAP Community

You have to be mindful of the financial statements, since many customers use business area to comply with IFRS 8 - Segmental Reporting and a change just implemented through configuration change can throw your financial reports for a toss. It would be helpful if you share bit more details for the change and why you want do such a change, when the change is being implemented (Eg, fiscal year end etc).

Thanks & regards

Sanil Bhandari

entry.title: UDM_SPECIALIST Mass invoice reason code upload
entry.content:
Hi everyone, 

I am using UDM_SPECIALIST and whenever I get invoice level update from customer, i update the reason code to the selected transaction/ invoice. For example, if customer stated that an invoice is pending due to PO issues, I have to update the reason code as " Po Related " so that our management can see how much uncollected amounts are under perticular issue. In order to upload the reason code, I have to open each account and select the transaction but My question is, is there a way to mass upload the reason code in udm_specialist ?

entry.title: Change fiscal year variant / Fiscal periods for live company codes.
entry.content:
Our client wants to change the fiscal year of live company codes from Non- Calendar year [October - September] to Calendar year [January-December]

We have referred some SAP notes on this, but they are offering SAP DMLT service to meet the requirement.

Anybody know any other / alternative solution to complete the requirement?

Kindly share.

Note: We are on SAP ECC system.

Thank you.

Best Regards,

Sumant

entry.title: The cost is booked by using KB15N with Qty and setteled but Qty is not showing
entry.content:
HI all.

the cost is booked in an internal order through cost element using tcode KB15N with quantity. Cost element is active with qty tick. when we booked the cost the quantity is showing correctly but when we settele the internal order and transffered the cost using tcode ko88, the cost is shifted but quantity is not showing. the quantity is KWH and we are trying to transffered electricty.

but other cost elements are working ok. like diesel , petrol etc.

 

BR

Qaiser

entry.title: One legal entity with multiple company code or One company code with multiple plant-Changes to setup
entry.content:
Hi Experts

Would like to pick up on expert opinion. 

Background - Client is already on SAP with following setup with One legal entity having two physical plant (Operations and Sales). These are created under 2 separate co.codes due to showing of profitability of operations plant with Intracompany (IC) Revenue rather than just COGS. Transfer Price in PCA is currently not active and client has IC sales process with IC price condition type. 

Now they are extending to other country and want to use same setup of 2 co.codes (one for Operations &  other for Sales) to show separate profitability for both plants. 

Since activating TP in PCA will be a challenge right now in live system with all other company code process to be changed, our suggestion is to have a separate PC & CC group to differentiate cost and operations plant should not show sales revenue as when doing outside reporting, both company codes will be merged as one legal entity and the overall COGS & Sales will be accordingly. 

The other problem is for Cost absorption and Other cost which are not in standard.

Can you please share your opinion on:

what the client might miss out if they continue with 2 co.code approach?

what are pros/cons of both scenarios?

Is TP in PCA activation is the best and only way to show profitability and defining GL for internal goods movement and internal revenue as STO will not create GL entry?

Thanks in advance

A

entry.title: CK40N CK24 CK11N COSTING RUN
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am new to product costing and looking for some help to understand the tcode CK40N, CK24 and CK11N.

1) Does periodic costing run CK40N need to be performed during downtime? During the costing run, if a transaction is posted what will be the material cost?

2) Can costing run be done weekly, what are the complications?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Asset transfer ABUMN - partial transfer of wrongly added acquisition value
entry.content:
Dear SAP experts

I have a question regarding the partial transfer of an asset using ABUMN.

In 2019 an asset was created (laptop).  Use life : 3 years.

In 2023 (asset is already fully depreciated – NBV = zero), a new asset was created for the replacement of this old asset.  But when posting the invoice, the old asset was used instead of the new one.  So the acquisition value on the old asset increased with the value of the new asset.  But because the initial asset was already fully depreciated, the new value did not depreciate.

Now I want to transfer the new value to the new created asset.  How can I do this (partial) transfer ?  I only want to transfer the new value to the new asset and keep the original value on the old asset.

When I try to do the partial transfer, using the new value, also a part of the accumulated deprecation will be transferred and that is not the purpose.  I only want to transfer the new acquisition value, which has not been depreciated yet.  Original acquisition value and accumulated depreciation (same amount because fully depreciated) should remain on the old asset.

Thank you for your input !  Much appreciated !

entry.title: Itemized Down Payment Clearing in MIRO
entry.content:
Hello Expert

I am looking for a quick solution to below mentioned issue;

Based on the PO Down Payment details, ME2DP was used to create Down Payment. Now while doing MIRO, we need to clear the down payment. But this should happen item wise. For example,

a) PO (Service PO) has one Item in Overview and Item detail level has 50 different services. 

b) While doing ML81N (SES), only 5 services are adopted and posted.

c) While doing MIRO, when I select PO, and see the 'Clear down Payment' screen, I see that Down payment is displayed for all 50 services. This is not correct, as it is not feasible for business to select the services one by one and proceed. This example I gave is small to explain. But in real term, SES will happen for 200+ services out of 1000+ services and selecting DP for 200+ manually in 'Clear Down Payment' screen is not possible.

How this can be achieved?

Regards

SZA

entry.title: Bitget Referral Code: qsk6 (Bitget Welcome Bonus in 2024)
entry.content:
Bitget Referral Code: qsk6 (Bitget sign up bonus 1000 USDT in 2024) 

Looking for the Bitget Referral Code? The latest one for 2024 is qsk6. Using this code gives you a 30% discount on trades. Additionally, new users on Bitget who register with the ""qsk6"" promo code can receive an exclusive promotional reward of up to $1000 USDT.

What is Bitget Referral Code?

The "qsk6" code within the Bitget app functions as a referral code. Entering this code provides you with a consistent reduction in trading fees, as well as a 30% discount on your trades. Furthermore, by sharing your referral code with friends, you have the chance to receive a generous 50% reward. Using this code offers a valuable opportunity to reduce fees and potentially increase your profits, while also introducing others to the platform.

What is Best Bitget Referral Code 2024?

The highly recommended Bitget Referral Code is qsk6. When you use this code during sign-up, you'll receive a generous bonus of $100. Sharing your code with friends gives you the opportunity to earn a substantial 50% commission. Essentially, this allows you to potentially secure the maximum sign-up bonus of up to $1000 in USDT as a welcoming reward. It's an excellent way to kickstart your trading journey with additional benefits, while also encouraging others to join and enjoy their own rewards.

How to use the Bitget Referral Code

The Bitget referral code is available to new users who haven’t yet registered on the exchange. Unfortunately, if you already have an account, you won’t be able to use the referral code.

However, Bitget offers various other opportunities for participating in promotions and earning rewards. Let’s explore these alternatives.

For newcomers to Bitget, here’s a step-by-step guide to claiming the referral code:

1. Start by visiting Bitget and clicking the blue ‘Sign Up’ button.
2. Provide accurate user details, as they will be verified for KYC and AML procedures.
3. When prompted for a referral code, enter qsk6.
4. Complete the registration process and fulfill all necessary verifications.
5. Once all conditions are met, you can promptly claim the welcome bonus.

This approach ensures that even without the referral code, new users can navigate the registration process smoothly and access the welcome bonus upon meeting the specified requirements.
What is the recommended referral code for Bitget?

The Bitget referral code is qsk6. To claim the 30% discount on Bitget trading fees, simply follow these steps:
Register for a new account on Bitget.
Make sure to use Bitget referral code qsk6.

What is the referral bonus for Bitget?

Invite your friends to join Bitget and collectively seize a portion of the referral prize pool! Each friend you invite can earn 50 USDT, with a maximum of 1,000 USDT per user. Users can invite friends to register on Bitget. Once they meet the requirements, both you and your friends will receive 50 USDT in trading bonuses, up to a maximum limit.

How do I claim my Bitget bonus?

Earn points daily and exchange them for USDT. Complete tasks within seven days to unlock all rewards. Sign up to receive a welcome package worth 1,000 USDT. Deposit a minimum of 50 USDT to earn 200 points. Execute your first trade of at least 50 USDT to earn 500 points.

Are the trading fee discounts applied automatically?

Absolutely. Once you register using our exclusive Bitget referral code qsk6, the 30% discount is automatically applied. No additional steps are required; simply dive into trading and enjoy a seamless 30% reduction on all fees. "

entry.title: BingX Referral Code: IMOIJ1 (New BingX Sign Up Bonus 5125 USDT)
entry.content:
BingX Referral Code: IMOIJ1 (New BingX Sign Up Bonus 5125 USDT)

Are you looking for BingX referral codes? The latest one for 2024 is ""IMOIJ1"". By using this code, you'll enjoy a 25% discount on trading fees. Moreover, new BingX users registering with the ""IMOIJ1"" promo code can earn an exclusive promotional reward of up to $5125 USDT.

What is the BingX Referral Code?

The code "IMOIJ1" within the BingX app functions as a referral code. Utilizing this code entitles you to a continuous discount on trading fees, along with a 25% reduction on your trades. Furthermore, by sharing your referral code with friends, you have the opportunity to earn a reward of up to $5125 USDT. This presents a fantastic opportunity to save on fees and potentially boost your earnings while introducing others to the platform.

What is BingX Referral Code in 2024?

The top BingX referral code for 2024 is ""IMOIJ1"". Using this code provides you with ongoing savings on trading fees and a 25% discount on your transactions. Additionally, when you share your referral code with friends, you can earn a bonus of up to 50%.

Furthermore, by registering with the BingX Referral Code IMOIJ1, you can receive a gift of up to $5125 USDT. Don't hesitate; act now! Sign up, claim your rewards, and immerse yourself in the trading experience on BingX Exchange.

How to find BingX Referral Code?

The prime BingX Referral Code to utilize is IMOIJ1. Upon application of this code, you'll be granted a sign-up bonus valued at $100. Furthermore, by disseminating your code to friends, you can secure a 50% commission. Consequently, you stand to achieve the utmost sign-up bonus of up to $100 in USDT as a welcoming incentive. It presents an exceptional method to embark on your trading expedition with added advantages, all the while extending invitations to others to partake and reap their own rewards.

How to use BingX Referral Code?

BingX, also recognized as Bingbon, functions as a global trading platform providing a range of digital assets, derivatives, and spot trading options. Its primary objective is to furnish users with a top-tier and highly secure trading environment.

Notably, BingX distinguishes itself with its copy-trading feature, positioning it as a prominent player in this domain. Its automatic Copy Trading feature is groundbreaking, enabling traders to effortlessly replicate the strategies of seasoned professionals with a single click. This streamlined tool empowers users to potentially profit by mimicking expert trading tactics.

Currently, BingX caters to a vast audience across more than 100 countries and regions, including nations like the United States, Canada, Australia, and the EU.

What sets BingX apart is its no-KYC (Know Your Customer) requirement, streamlining the user onboarding process. Notably, the platform received recognition in 2021, clinching the esteemed “Best Exchange Broker” award from TradingView, underscoring its reliability and credibility.

Rest assured, creating a free account today not only grants access but also secures a complimentary BingX sign-up bonus. It serves as a portal to explore a platform renowned for its innovation and stringent security measures.

To register for BingX with referral code ""IMOIJ1"": Step 1: Click on the link: BingX Sign Up Step 2: Fill in the registration email information and choose a password. Step 3: Verify if the code ""IMOIJ1"" is displayed under the ""Referral code (Optional)"" box. If not, please enter it. Step 4: Agree to the Customer Agreement and Privacy Policy. Step 5: Click ""Sign Up"".

How to Sign Up & Apply BingX Referral Code?

Start by accessing the BingX website through the provided link and create an account.
Alternatively, visit the Google Play Store and download the BingX app onto your smartphone.
Next, register using either your email address or mobile number, set up a password, input a referral code such as IMOIJ1, and enter the verification code.
Ensure to use the BingX referral code: IMOIJ1 to avail of up to $100 & 25% fee discount on free trading.
Once the referral code is applied, click ‘Submit’ to receive a verification code for your account.
Subsequently, anticipate a welcome bonus message and be directed to the rewards section.
Proceed by adding more assets from your private locker or bank account. Then, navigate to the crypto page to start trading.
Upon reaching the main homepage, you'll encounter a variety of cryptocurrencies; invest your funds in any of them.
Keep an eye on the market and sell your currency when its value rises, enabling you to cash out your profits.
How to Share the BingX Referral Code?

You can distribute the BingX referral code IMOIJ1 to your friends and family members, enabling them to access exclusive offers from BingX Exchange.

The top BingX referral code for 2024 is ""IMOIJ1"". Using this code provides you with ongoing savings on trading fees and a 25% discount on your transactions. Additionally, when you share your referral code with friends, you can earn a bonus of up to 50%.

Furthermore, by registering with the BingX Referral Code IMOIJ1, you can receive a gift of up to $5125 USDT. Don't hesitate; act now! Sign up, claim your rewards, and immerse yourself in the trading experience on BingX Exchange.

3. When prompted for a referral code, enter qsk6.
4. Complete the registration process and fulfill all necessary verifications.

This approach ensures that even without the referral code, new users can navigate the registration process smoothly and access the welcome bonus upon meeting the specified requirements.

Register for a new account on Bitget.
Make sure to use Bitget referral code qsk6.
